calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Kirk, Esq. (415-693-996) of O'Connor and Associates for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Babione, Esq. (925-355-9800) of Ferber Law for Defendant.

RULING - ARGUED. Defendant argues breach of settlement does not allow acceleration of payment. Plaintiff argues anticipatory repudiation. Defendant objects to "earnings of traction lab employees" on proposed order. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DOUBLE ROCK VENTURES LLC, DOUBLEROCK FUND I, L.P., SURAJ RAJWANI APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is taken under submission.** Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/RBU)

**After the hearing, The Court adopts the tentative ruling and signs the Right to attach Order and Order for Issuance of Writ of attachment.(see scanned order for details)**
